minion: You fight well. I admit that.
boss: So that's what it feels like.
trap: Who... put that there.
Dishonorable.
I should've checked the floor.
Trap... well designed... ugh.

minion: First time that's happened. Okay second time.
I had an exit and I missed it.
boss: Couldn't steal my way out of this one.
Worth the risk. Wasn't worth the risk.
I had a plan. The plan had a flaw.
trap: My own trap energy... returned.
That was my idea. Someone stole it.
Walked into that. Classic.
My lockpick can't fix this.

minion: Extra mana would have been nice.
boss: I understand it now. A bit late.
I ran out of spells. I should've rationed.
That boss had resistances. Many resistances.
trap: Magical trap. Honestly impressed.
I felt the enchantment and stepped on it anyway.
This is what hubris looks like.
The runes — I should've read the runes.
default: I was so close to a breakthrough.

minion: I forgive them. I still lost though.
boss: The gods will make sense of this.
This was the plan all along. Probably.
trap: No divine protection for traps. Noted.
God gives, traps take.
I blessed the floor. Not enough.
Perhaps I should've blessed myself first.
default: I heal others. I forgot myself.

minion: I've died before. It's fine. It's not fine.
trap: A trap killed a necromancer. History is made.
Whoever built this trap was artistically inclined.
I will raise this trap. And destroy it.
Acceptable. I've died to worse.
default: I prepared for this. I did not prepare well.

minion: They closed the gap too fast.
In the forest, I'd have survived this.
I had a shot. I missed.
boss: Not enough arrows in the world.
Seven arrows. None of them worked.
trap: I track animals. Not floor pressure plates.
Who puts a trap there? Honestly.
My survival instincts failed me indoors.
Nature never did this to me.
default: First arrow. Second arrow. Third arrow. Out.
Out of range. And out of time.

minion: Chat, did you see that? CHAT!
Guys I'm dying on stream! GUYS!
boss: This is so going on the highlight reel.
The boss got me. My viewers will avenge this.
Died to the boss. First time on stream.
trap: WAIT WAIT CHAT DID YOU SEE THAT
Trap jumpscare PogChamp
My chat voted to go left. I went right.
That's a clip. That is absolutely a clip.

minion: It didn't... respond to the command.
My companion couldn't reach in time.
I was trying to tame it...
boss: My companion will carry on without me.
I've faced dangerous animals. This wins.
trap: My animals sensed it. I didn't listen.
A ranger would've spotted that.
The dungeon doesn't play by nature's rules.
My companion tried to warn me.
default: Every beast was a person once... in my head.
I thought I could tame it.
Nature wins some. Dungeons win others.

boss: I laughed the whole way down.
A good death. A VERY good death.
trap: A TRAP? A TRAP KILLED ME?!
No honor in this.
TRAP! COWARD BUILD!
My ancestors are disappointed.

minion: I did not see that one.
One hit. That's all it took.
boss: Speed means nothing against power that large.
trap: I stepped without thinking. A true failure.
The trap was faster than my mind.
I paused. That was the mistake.
Flow interrupted.

minion: A ballad died with me here.
boss: The ballad needs a darker ending.
The boss didn't appreciate the music.
trap: No song for traps. Not dignified enough.
The trap struck mid-verse.
A discordant end.
I was going to write about this. Past tense.
default: Every ballad needs a third act.
I'll finish this in the next life.

minion: Such a poor specimen of cartography to die on.
boss: I shall be a paragraph at best.
Document this for the next scholar.
trap: A trap not on my map?
Cartographic failure!
I'll add it. Posthumously.
Where IS the index for this room?

boss: The boss is BANNED next time.
trap: Trap was off-screen. Cheap.
Damage tick was insane.
Trap was MODDED.
Latency spike. Convenient.

boss: We didn't even get to the third act.
A fitting death for the role.
The costume held up well. Mostly.
trap: The prop was real?!
Method acting has limits.
The trap broke the fourth wall.
I didn't see THIS in rehearsals.

minion: I... should have used Hallowed Ground.
Shield held. Pity the rest of me didn't.
boss: Tell the healer I bought her... a few seconds.
A clean death. A clean wipe.
I had one stack of Divine Veil left.
trap: Provoke doesn't work on traps. Noted.
Even a paladin steps wrong.
My boots... lit up.
I am the tank. I am also the trap-tester.

minion: Tell the tank... it wasn't his fault...
boss: I held them as long as I could.
It was a wipe worth telling stories about.
Use my body as a checkpoint.
trap: The fog of war... covered the floor too.
I was watching HP bars, not the ground.
A healer's blind spot.
I felt the tile click.

minion: A fine blade. A finer death.
I draw — and I am drawn.
The cut was true. So was theirs.
Steel before honour. Honour before all.
boss: I sheathe my sword. For the last time.
Tell the master my form was perfect.
trap: The floor... cut faster.
Dishonourable, this.
Even Mifune stepped on a board.
The dungeon strikes first.
I had no draw for that.

minion: Hands not done casting. Body very done.
I felt the cast bar fill. And then... nothing.
Sleep was on cooldown. Damn it.
boss: Tell the void I'll be along shortly.
trap: No mana cost on traps?! Unfair.
Should've cast Levitate.
I read the wrong scroll.
The arcane could not save me from a hole.
default: Aaagh — gimme a sec to cast—

trap: Who puts a trap THERE.
Ow.
Trap. Smart.
I saw it. I stepped on it.
shooting_arrows: I will never trust a corridor.
dragon_trap: There's a DRAGON in the trap?
Fire. Where there was no fire.
spike_pit: I forgot to check the floor.

greedy: I should've taken the gold first.
At least I looted one chest.
Leave my share. Do NOT leave my share.
I'm not dead, I'm temporarily unliquidated.
paranoid: I knew it. I KNEW it.
Every instinct said no. I came anyway.
The paranoia was right all along.
Next time. I'll trust the feeling next time.
speed_runner: That cost me twelve seconds minimum.
I was on pace until this.
completionist: Ninety-four percent. I'll never forgive this.
martyr: This is what I was built for.
Take the victory I bought you.
I held long enough. Didn't I?
coward: I should've left when I said I should've left.
My instincts were correct and I ignored them.
I knew. I ALWAYS know. I never leave.
overconfident: Okay. Okay that one got me.
I was FINE and then I wasn't.
I've soloed worse. I lied about that.
cartographer: Update the map. Remove my marker.
My notes survive even if I don't.
party_loyal: Don't let my death slow the party.
Was it enough? Did I do enough?
I'm glad we made it this far together.
No regrets. Not a single one.
solo: This is on me. Just me.
At least no one else got hurt.
raid_leader: The party can survive without me. Probably.
I should've called the retreat earlier.
Phase three. Someone else handle phase three.
underdog: I was so close to unstoppable.
Always the underdog. Even in death.
Closer than last time. Small wins.
I'll be back. And I'll be STRONGER.
traumatized: Same as last time. Exactly the same.
I survived before. Not this time.
At least now I can stop dreading it.
the_fan: Killed by the one I loved.
Worth it to see them up close.
They were more beautiful than I imagined.
vulture: Waited too long. Story of my life.
I was watching and then I wasn't.
inquisitor: The mechanic... I almost cracked it.
I was close to the nexus point.
Next group: disable the second focal node first.
Knowledge transfers. My death is data.
The dungeon yielded its secret. Too late for me.
echo: The path failed. So I followed it.
The one I followed didn't make it either.
Pattern: step for step, death for death.
mimic_handler: That wasn't a mimic. I assumed it was safe.
The one time I trusted the chest.
I guarded against mimics. Not this.
My anti-mimic instinct failed in the wrong direction.
